module.name: output_impl
module.spec: New package cli/output/ contains: result.go (Result types), presenter.go (Presenter interface + Render), plain.go (PlainPresenter), color.go (ColorPresenter), json.go (JSONPresenter), ansi.go (ANSI constants + helpers), tty.go (IsTerminal + SelectPresenter), color_test.go (guardrail test). New subpackage cli/commands/ contains one file per command plus command.go (interface + types) and helpers.go. cli/registry.go has the Registry. cli/cli.go retains Run + RunWithRender + stripGlobalFlags.

Presenter interface in cli/output/presenter.go declares one method per Result type: Todo, List, Show, DiffEdge, DiffExpanded, DiffAll, Ok, Error, Text, Version. Three implementations (PlainPresenter, ColorPresenter, JSONPresenter) each implement all methods. The Render(Presenter, Result) function dispatches a Result to the matching method via a single type-switch. See command interface.

Result types in cli/output/result.go. Sealed interface (unexported isResult method). Concrete types: TodoResult{State}, ListResult{State,Verbose,SpecContents,MarkerContents}, ShowResult{IsSpec,ID,Spec,Marker,Content,LinkedSpecs,LinkedMarkers}, DiffEdgeResult{Result}, DiffExpandedResult{ID,Edges}, DiffAllResult{State,Edges}, OkResult{Command,Message}, ErrorResult{Command,Message,Hint,Exit}, TextResult{Text}, VersionResult{Version}. ShowResult and ListResult carry pre-resolved content so presenters stay pure (no I/O).

PlainPresenter in cli/output/plain.go. Methods are byte-identical migrations of the format* functions from the pre-refactor cli/cli.go. No I/O, no color, no JSON. Plain_test.go asserts golden-string equivalence to pre-refactor behavior. See plain mode.

ColorPresenter in cli/output/color.go. Independent implementation from Result data; shares prose via package-level constants (markerSyntax). Wraps semantic elements in ANSI sequences per the palette. Uses helpers from ansi.go (red, green, yellow, cyan, bold). colorizePatch applies per-line coloring to unified diff output. See color mode.

JSONPresenter in cli/output/json.go. Uses encoding/json with struct-driven field ordering and HTML escaping disabled for readability. Per-method serialization per the JSON schema. The marshal helper uses json.Encoder with SetEscapeHTML(false) and trims the trailing newline. See JSON mode.

cli/commands/command.go defines Command interface (Run(ctx Context) (Result, int); Meta() Meta), Context struct (Args, Dir, Orch), Meta struct (Name, Short, Usage, Flags), and the Version package var. The Context carries the orchestrator so commands can call orch methods. Meta is the single source of truth for command metadata. See command interface and metadata single source.

cli/registry.go exports var Registry = map[string]commands.Command{...} mapping command names to Command instances. Commands needing embedded content (help text, skill guide, init template) receive it via struct fields set at Registry construction time. Provides derived helpers subcommandHelp(name) (returns cmd.Meta().Usage) and recognizedFlagsFor(cmd) (builds map from cmd.Meta().Flags). The rejectUnknownFlags function uses recognizedFlagsFor. See metadata single source.

The help text is currently still embedded as cli/help.txt (embedded via go:embed in cli.go). The HelpCommand returns it as a TextResult. In a future landing, the help text will be generated from the Registry (static prose from fragments.go + command table from Registry enumeration). See registry.

cli/output/color_test.go contains a battery of representative Result values; for each, asserts stripANSI(ColorPresenter.X(r)) == PlainPresenter.X(r) for every Presenter method X. Battery covers: synced case, drifted marker, drifted spec, deleted spec, deleted marker, no-baseline, multi-edge expanded, --all with multiple edges, empty state, unlinked warning, every OkResult/ErrorResult shape, TextResult, VersionResult. See guardrail property.
